§6Technetium-99§f is a common fission waste product.

§eSources:§f
• Uranium and Plutonium fission byproduct
• §bZIRNOX§f reactor (excellent Tc-99 production)
• Nuclear waste processing via §bSILEX§f

§eUses:§f
• §bTechnetium Steel§f alloy
• §bAE2 Storage Components§f - valuable for storage systems
• Advanced electronics

§aTip:§f ZIRNOX reactors are excellent Tc-99 farms - valuable nuclear "waste".
